content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1560: The Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm! Translator: Sigma_ Editor: Hitesh_

“You think I didn’t prepare anything? Naive! Before I came here, I studied you with Edgar and Yuan Zu, and I know your secrets. Except for the fact that we don’t know where your soul comes from, we know about your power Upanishads, body level, and even that marvelous soul altar!”

Zhen Ru wore a cold face, urging the Myriad Shape Tribe’s innate supernatural ability. She had turned into a small light dot like a firefly, sticking on Shi Yan’s lower abdomen.

The devouring black hole was shattered by the explosion of so many mines and the resultant shockwaves. Previously, it was filled with dregs of heaven and earth, but now, it finally shattered under the fierce explosions.

Zhen Ru seized the chance and stabbed at Shi Yan’s God power Ancient Tree!

A cold light appeared in the world of Shi Yan’s God power Ancient Tree like a lightning strike across the world. In this center of power, the fountainhead of energy, Zhen Ru had created numerous lightning strikes, using a terrifying destructive power to attack the branches of the God power Ancient Tree!

Crack! Crack! Crack!

Crystal branches filled with pure energy were broken and a large amount of energy gushed out, no longer under Shi Yan’s control.

Almost at the same time, Cantecie got the message from Zhen Ru’s soul as well. She instantly grabbed the chance to expand her tornado. That tornado became a massive smoke column that reached the void. Shi Yan’s soul was vaguely seen at the head of the blood dragons.

It was the magical abilities of the Soul Control Power Upanishad and the negative energy. However, at this moment, they were stirred into shattering by the hundred-meters wide wind blades. The blood dragons didn’t have more energy to supplement, so they collapsed slowly.

Boom!

The first blood dragon exploded, turning into a blood mist. Meanwhile, the tornado spun rapidly, refining it bit by bit.

Inside the massive tornado, Cantecie was cheered up. Hundreds of smaller tornadoes hovered by her like the spinning bird nests. Controlled by profound technique, they continued to attack the blood dragons.

Slowly, the blood dragons were killed, turning into blood mist and vanishing. The negative emotions those dragons had carried also dispersed.

Cantecie’s eyes sparkled. Her lips curled coldly, her ample bosom shivering as she stood up. Countless tornadoes beside her body screamed; she was like a Goddess of Wind who brought harsh gusts to this world to destroy Shi Yan.

Just as Shi Yan’s God power Ancient Tree was damaged by Zhen Ru, Cantecie’s threat had come soon after. He had to face the enemies inside and outside, and his situation was really perilous.

From a distance, Mei Ji turned saw a world-tearing tornado emerge as Shi Yan’s savage body shrank. Her charming face turned resolute and cruel. “Fan De Lei, I’ll risk my life with you! If you want to die with me, just try to stop me. I do want to see if you have such powers!”

Sizzle! Sizzle!

A cold white mist emitted from Mei Ji’s graceful body as she turned into a beautiful icy woman amidst the ice.

Her entire body was now a beautiful ice crystal. She looked like an exquisite ice sculpture God had created in the bitter winter, which was arrogant, ruthless, and cold. Nobody dared to look at her!

At that moment, Fan De Lei’s star seal was broken instantly while a magical Absolute Beginning Original Symbol arose above Mei Ji’s head. It released a terrifying coldness that froze the entire world. With her as the center, the surroundings were frozen at a speed naked eyes could observe!

“Crack! Crack! Crack!”

The roof of the palace suddenly grew crystal columns, and the entire palace slowly became a massive, majestic ice palace. Even the tiles on the ground were frozen. Beautiful snowflakes fell from the void, each of them carrying Mei Ji’s resolution!

Heaven and Earth were frozen, making this world a snowy, frosty white world.

Mei Ji was truly the Goddess of Ice. As Fan De Lei paled in fright, she said coldly, “I used to consider you my senior, but from now on, you and I are arch enemies! Because of your own desire, you betrayed your own kind! You’re the Phantom Clan’s traitor! On behalf of Grannie, I announce that you are exiled from the Phantom Clan!”

Hearing her, Fan De Lei turned ashen, his lips shivering. However, Mei Ji didn’t know if it was because he was enraged or chilled.

“Madam Mei Ji!”

“Madam Mei Ji!”

“You got rid of him!”

The Phantom Clan fellows screamed and cheered. However, they also yelled and booed at Fan De Lei angrily.

“Crack! Crack! Crack!”

Mei Ji used her ice body, soaring up into the sky and heading toward Cantecie. Her ice sculpture-like body looked beautiful but gloomy in the void; wherever she passed, space cracks were closed because of freezing up.

Fan De Lei checked and found that the icy energy from Mei Ji was utterly terrifying! Even if he risked his life with her, he couldn’t endure it. The attack would be strikingly unimaginable!

Mei Ji was truly risking her life!

For Shi Yan, Mei Ji had unexpectedly risked her life. She didn’t care about death, using all of her power.

Her resolute action was like an icy arrow thrusting into Fan De Lei’s chest, who felt more agitated than being attacked physically. Seeing Mei Ji glide past him to reach Cantecie, he gritted his teeth as he poured his anger on Cantecie.

He thought that if Cantecie hadn’t forced him, the relationship between him and Mei Ji wouldn’t have turned worse. He also hated Cantecie for trying to make Shi Yan throw his anger on him, who ended up attacking him so savagely.

“Die! All of you should die!”

Clenching his jaw, Fan De Lei looked frightfully sinister. He shouted at Cantecie and Mei Ji as if he hated that he couldn’t kill them both.

“Mei Ji! You! Are you crazy?” Cantecie was on her way to kill Shi Yan when she recognized that her surroundings were now a world of snow. She saw Mei Ji turn into an ice statue, burning her vitality to urge all of her power. The cold energy had frozen the entire place, including the space cracks!

This power made Cantecie discolor in fear.

Mei Ji didn’t say anything, just gazing at Cantecie while furiously urging her Ice power Upanishad. Countless ice mountain grew from the land, turning into several-thousand-meters-long swords that aimed at the latter.

The place was covered with a terrible snowstorm, covering Cantecie. The entire world was vague and hazy amidst the white snow. Added with Cantecie’s howling tornadoes, this territory had become so maliciously harsh. The members of the Phantom Clan had their vision blurred in this world of snow and storm, only able to hear some earth-shaking explosions and nothing else.

But, they all knew that Mei Ji was only at the First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. Of course, she wasn’t an equal match for Cantecie. They also knew that with each passing minute Mei Ji acted persistently, she was one minute closer to her death.

“Madam Mei Ji...”

Many young men of the Phantom Clan called Mei Ji’s name while sobbing, their faces twisted in agony. They faced the sky, looking at Shi Yan. Behind the terrifying snowstorm, Shi Yan had returned to his normal shape, his face distorting as if he was struggling against his inner demons. He didn’t look like he was aware of the surroundings.

“For you, this woman doesn’t care about her life, burning her vitality. I’m so surprised, though!” Zhen Ru’s voice arose from his lower abdomen. “Hmm, if she hadn’t stopped Cantecie, you would have died already. But, what’s it good for? How long can she stop Cantecie for? She courts death!”

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Zhen Ru was destroying many branches of Shi Yan’s God power Ancient Tree, pieces of crystals and energy scattered everywhere.

At that instant, a dazzling light shot out of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, emerging in Shi Yan’s Sea of Consciousness. That light pierced through the void, gliding across many spaces before it entered his lower abdomen, where was situated the magical world of his God power Ancient Tree.

Unimaginable!

The strong light acted as if it contained Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness, hitting Zhen Ru precisely. In this endless sea of stars, no race, creature, planet, or divine weapon could resist this light. As soon as the light pierced through Zhen Ru, she was left with a massive hole in her chest!

It was like a sword had stabbed into a thin sheet of paper. Zhen Ru’s chest was pierced through easily and smoothly.

“This...This light...aura...My goodness!”

Zhen Ru clutched her chest in fear inside Shi Yan’s God power Ancient Tree. However, as soon as she touched that light, her fingers were cut off. She screeched in agony, trying to back off to get rid of that light. “I finally know why my Pure Gold Spirit Ants perished...”

Trying her best to urge the power Upanishads and ignore the hole in her chest, she slowly faded away like a faint cloud in the sunshine, vanishing completely.

Pure, refined energy gushed from Shi Yan’s acupuncture points like seven hundred and twenty streams connecting with the God power Ancient. The torrential, unceasing energy soon healed the damaged God power Ancient Tree.

Shortly, the broken branches were re-growing fast.

Receiving the immense God power, the God power Ancient Tree recovered and started growing magically.

The growing God power Ancient Tree was the most significant appearance of another breakthrough! At the First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, Shi Yan had broken the most challenging bottleneck!

Boom!

Shi Yan’s soul altar was shaking while his Sea of Consciousness twirled fiercely. Amidst the lightning strikes, his Soul Consciousness began to condense. The soul pond in the Sea of Consciousness was boiling strangely as the black hole in the territory was dripping Original Soul Energy Fluid into the pond.

The Original Soul Energy Fluid was refined after a hard process. As his realm was improved, his refining speed was accelerated ten times!

Shortly, the energy he had swallowed recently was refined thoroughly into the purest energy in his God power Ancient Tree, Sea of Consciousness, and the soul pond.
